hero_subtitle: Create brand-level fashion visuals without a physical studio. AI transforms your product shots into stunning model photography.
hero_inline_subtitle: Just upload a product photo taken with your phone. AI will transform it into a stunning catalog visual on professional models.
features_section_title: It All Starts With One Photo
features_section_subtitle: Say goodbye to expensive photoshoots, model hiring, and days-long delivery. Get results in minutes with TexStudio AI.
features_subtitle: We bring the full power of professional catalog photography to your desktop with AI.
feature_1_desc: Professional models with diverse ethnicities and body types. Pick the perfect model for every collection.
feature_2_desc: A specialized AI engine that faithfully transfers fine fabric textures, prints, and patterns.
feature_3_desc: Studio, outdoor, editorial, and more. Concepts that match every brand identity.
feature_4_desc: Skip hours-long studio sessions. Your images are ready in minutes.
feature_speed_desc: Get high-resolution images with 20 different variations in just a few minutes.
feature_fabric_desc: The garment's texture, patterns, and finest details are transferred seamlessly onto the model.
feature_ai_desc: Achieve real photo studio quality with Fal.ai and advanced diffusion models.
feature_sales_desc: Directly influence customer purchase decisions by creating professional catalog imagery.
studio_subtitle: Professional, minimal, automated. Upload your garment and let the magic happen.
